title: LAND Protocol Land Record Verification Response
description: JSON Schema for the public verification response from a LAND Protocol-conformant implementing platform. Published at GET /api/schema/land-record on any conformant platform.

landId.description: Unique numeric identifier for the land parcel on the implementing platform.

spvTokenName.description: ERC-1155 token name representing this parcel's SPV (e.g., 'FARMLAND-001').

rootHash.description: SHA-256 Merkle root of all committed section hashes, encoded as lowercase hexadecimal. Null if the record has not yet been anchored.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the LAND Protocol hashing schema used to construct this root hash (e.g., '1.0', '1.1').

anchoredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the first onchain anchor.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent record update.

frozen.description: Whether the record is frozen (locked against further updates).

anchors.description: Blockchain anchor proofs for this record.

base.description: Anchor proof on Base (Coinbase L2). Primary anchor layer.

anchored.description: Whether the record has been anchored on Base.

transactionHash.description: Transaction hash of the anchoring transaction on Base.

blockNumber.description: Block number of the anchoring transaction on Base.

anchoredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the Base anchor.

mainnet.description: Anchor proof on Ethereum Mainnet (L1). Optional promotion layer for maximum permanence.

anchored.description: Whether the record has been promoted to Ethereum Mainnet.

transactionHash.description: Transaction hash of the anchoring transaction on Ethereum Mainnet.

blockNumber.description: Block number of the anchoring transaction on Ethereum Mainnet.

anchoredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the Mainnet anchor.

contractAddress.description: Address of the LandRecordRegistry contract on Ethereum Mainnet.

sections.description: Five core data sections, each independently hashed and tracked.

identity.description: Legal and geographic identity of the parcel. Includes parcel ID, legal description, county, state, acreage, and holding entity.

quality.description: Productive characteristics of the land. Includes soil productivity scores (CSR2/NCCPI), drainage, crop history, and water rights.

valuation.description: Appraiser-attested market valuation. Includes appraised value (USD), appraisal date, and appraiser name and license number.

legal.description: Legal encumbrances and title chain. Includes lien disclosure, deed references, chain of title, and easements.

compliance.description: Regulatory and entity status. Includes entity formation status, KYC status, tax status, and environmental flags.

ownership.description: Optional (schema v1.1). Holding entity identity, deed grantor, and beneficial owners. When present, included in the root hash.

recordCounts.description: Anonymized counts of recorded legal instruments. All fields MUST be present for LAND Anchored conformance; totalLiens MUST NOT be omitted even if zero.

totalLiens.description: Total count of all lien records (active, released, and subordinated). MUST be present. Zero is valid.

titleChainEntries.description: Number of entries in the chain of title.

attestations.description: Total number of third-party attestation records.

verifiedAttestations.description: Number of attestations that have been independently verified.

comparableSales.description: Number of comparable sales recorded to support the valuation.

hasGovernmentData.description: Whether a government data bridge (county assessor APN + assessed value + county record URL) is linked.

summary.description: Anonymized summary for public display. No PII is included.

appraisedValue.description: Appraised value in USD as a string (e.g., '1280000').

tokenizedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the land was tokenized.

blockchainTokenId.description: ERC-1155 token ID representing this parcel's SPV on the blockchain.

status.description: Current status of this section. NOT_CAPTURED: data not collected. CAPTURED: data committed and hashed. ATTESTED: independently verified by a licensed third party.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this section's canonical data, encoded as lowercase hexadecimal. Null when status is NOT_CAPTURED.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this section was last updated.
